allow:
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:5080/api/v1/auth/login" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin@123"}' 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('accessToken','NO_TOKEN'\)[:80] if d.get\('success'\) else 'FAIL: '+str\(d\)\)" 2>&1)
